name: How to Make Yogurt in Microwave
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Yogurt Starter OR, dried culture
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine milk and nonfat dry milk in a large deep bowl.
2. Heat for 12 minutes at full power or until boiling. Cool to 115°F. Monitor the temperature with a microwave thermometer.
3. Mix the starter with about half a cup of cooled milk until smooth.
4. Add the milk mixture to the remaining milk, mixing until well blended.
5. Pour into a warmed, large deep bowl. Place the temperature probe in the milk and cover with plastic wrap.
6. Heat to 113°F on full power and hold at that temperature for 3.5 to 5.5 hours (reset the timer as needed).
7. Chill. The yogurt will continue to thicken as it chills.
8. Drain liquid from the yogurt after chilling. Yogurt will become thin if the liquid is stirred in.
Makes about 4 cups.
